name: api-backend
description: API REST con JWT, CRUD usuarios y subida de archivos – Serverless Lambda

scripts.start:local: set PORT=3000&& set DB_HOST=localhost&& set DB_PORT=5432&& set DB_NAME=appdb&& set DB_USER=postgres&& set DB_PASSWORD=postgres&& set JWT_SECRET=felix_cabrera_jwt_secret_2024_super_secure&& set JWT_EXPIRES_IN=7d&& set UPLOAD_DIR=uploads&& set NODE_ENV=development&& node src/index.js
scripts.test: echo "No hay tests configurados aún" && exit 0
